problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
